Results_Based_Mecanisms
Activities
33314415-10e1-8162-af49-d467c9cb9a89, 33314415-10e1-81f2-abaa-c7a3094b48d5, 33314415-10e1-816b-8501-e729f39a7fc3, 33314415-10e1-813e-8c8b-d0a3943fccc7, 33314415-10e1-811d-a76d-d1226be2d678, 33314415-10e1-814d-9e49-f66ef5f746b4, 33314415-10e1-8107-a169-c5a716220df0, 33314415-10e1-81be-8f8c-ddfcb47c47fc, 33314415-10e1-8122-bf80-c2e81cf53425, 33314415-10e1-8141-b23b-f48a4f210fb1
Description
Financial mechanisms that compensate land stewards and projects based on measurable ecological outcomes—such as carbon sequestration, water purification, biodiversity conservation, or other ecosystem services. Includes payment for ecosystem services schemes, green bonds, and other instruments that link funding to verified regenerative results.
sort_order
